name: king-max
description: Static Queens clone with regression tests

scripts.build:site: npm run build-storybook && rm -rf _site && mkdir -p _site _site/js _site/stories && cp index.html _site/index.html && cp styles.css _site/styles.css && cp -R js/. _site/js/ && cp -R storybook-static/. _site/stories/ && touch _site/.nojekyll
